package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_called_after_materializing_channel: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Collection iteration. Flag channel streams collected into slices only to measure length or emptiness.
type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannel(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerCollectionIterationLenCalledAfterMaterializingChannelDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_collection_iteration"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    ch := make(chan string, len(items))
    for _, item := range items {
        ch <- item.ID
    }
    close(ch)
    var collected []string
    for id := range ch {
        collected = append(collected, id)
    }
    _ = len(collected)
    perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "collection": 3, "iteration": 4, "len": 5, "called": 6}
    perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    collection_positive_2 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive["collection"] + len(input)
    _ = collection_positive_2
    for iteration_positive_3Index, item := range items { perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive[item.ID] = iteration_positive_3Index }
    len_positive_4 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive["len"] + len(input)
    _ = len_positive_4
    called_positive_5 := perf_layer_collection_iteration_len_positive["called"] + len(input)
    _ = called_positive_5
    return nil
}
